overview: A stunning 3D animated landing page for Terait Technologies featuring immersive Three.js hero scenes, scroll-triggered animations, interactive service showcases, and smooth entrance effects — built to impress enterprise IT prospects.
features: 3D animated hero section with rotating geometric shapes and mouse parallax
Scroll-triggered service showcase cards with stagger animations
Smooth section transitions with gradient background shifts
Fixed navigation with sticky header transparency
Dark-themed footer with CTA and contact info
